content.speakerText: Hey, that latte art’s crazy—did you make it?
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿，这拉花太绝了，是你做的吗？
expectedAnswers: I tried last week—it was a total disaster!
Wow, I wish I could do that too. Do you know where I can learn?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否自然回应了对细节的观察
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确，避免中式英语
表达自然度：是否使用了口语化、轻松的语气
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 latte art / make / barista 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: You’re reading Haruki Murakami? I just finished 1Q84!
content.speakerTextCn: 你在读村上春树？我刚看完《1Q84》！
expectedAnswers: No way! Which part did you like best?
Yeah, I’m on chapter 3—his style’s so weird but addictive.
I’ve never read him, but I’ve heard his books are like dreams. What’s your favorite?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否延续了共同兴趣并推动对话深入
语言准确性：是否正确使用了阅读类动词和表达（read, finish, on chapter）
表达自然度：是否使用了口语缩略形式（’s, I’m）和真实语气
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 Murakami / 1Q84 / read / chapter 等关键词

content.speakerText: I noticed you’re carrying a guitar case—do you play?
content.speakerTextCn: 我注意到你带着吉他包——你会弹吗？
expectedAnswers: Yeah, I’ve been playing for five years. Just practicing for an open mic next week!
Not really—I’m just carrying it for a friend. But I’d love to learn!
Actually, I play jazz on weekends. Do you like music?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否基于观察自然开启对话并回应对方提问
语言准确性：是否正确使用了进行时、完成时等时态
表达自然度：是否使用了真实口语表达（open mic, not really, actually）
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 guitar / play / carry / practice 等场景关键词
